instructions: This sheet is intended for 6th Edition Hero System Games. More specifically, it is intended for heroic-level campaigns rather than super hero Champions campaigns. It can be used alone in Roll20. A dice rolling script such as HeroRoller (https://wiki.roll20.net/Script:HeroRoller) is helpful for dealing with Hero System normal damage. A sheet portrait section can be used to display player character avatars if the present portrat image links are replaced with links to external images. If Roll20 implements linking to the bio avatar image, this is where the html code would be changed.
